introSection: Storm is a steel roller coaster located at Etnaland in Belpasso, Sicily, Italy. It was manufactured by Mack Rides and constructed by RCS GmbH.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Storm opened on 20 April 2013 as part of a new theme park expansion. Previously, Etnaland was a water park.

fullText:
Storm is a steel roller coaster located at Etnaland in Belpasso, Sicily, Italy. It was manufactured by Mack Rides and constructed by RCS GmbH.

Storm opened on 20 April 2013 as part of a new theme park expansion. Previously, Etnaland was a water park.
